Quality Education.reason: Focus on logical reasoning skills supports Target 4.4 ('relevant skills for employment').
As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops 'analytical reasoning' skills (Target 4.4) for evaluating complex arguments and 'social issues' (Target 4.7).
